title: Potion Books
body:
Potion Books adds most of the vanilla potion effects as enchantments to mainly put on your armor but also tools and weapons.

 

### List Of Enchants - Max Level - Special Notes
 

**Helmet Enchants**



Water Breathing - 1 - Triggers In Water

Night Vision - 1

Saturation - 1 - Triggers on food eaten

Hunger - 2 - Triggers on food eaten

Blindness - 1

Nausea - 1


**Chestplate Enchants**



Instant Health - 1 - 10% Chance to trigger on damage

Regeneration - 2 - 10% Chance to trigger on damage

Resistance - 1 - Triggers on damage

Fire Resistance - 1 - Triggers on damage

Invisibility - 1

Glowing - 1

Instant Damage - 1 - 10% Chance to trigger on damage


**Leggings Enchants**

Speed - 2

Jump Boost - 2 - Triggers on jump

Absorption - 1 - 5% Chance to trigger on damage

Hero Of The Village - 1

Dolphins Grace - 2 - Triggers In Water

Mining Fatigue - 1 


**Boots Enchants**

Luck - 1

Slow Falling - 1 - Triggers when falling

Conduit Power - 1 - Triggers when in water

Slowness - 2


**Sword Enchants**

Strength - 2 - Triggers when you hit a mob

Weakness - 2 - Triggers when you hit a mob


**Tool Enchants**

Haste - 2 - Triggers when you break a block
